author: @thetreatment498

text: do you have any tips or guides for making content like this? I already have an idea of the plot I just have no idea where to even get started
author: @blacktemplar7776

text:
First things first: Resources! You need Sounds, musics, spirtes and images for you rpg battle.
Look around and record with audacity some sound effects you like, and get some good battle music. Be carefull with copyrighted musics though or your video will get blocked.
Next get the sprits of the characters you want to battle. You can find sprites everywhere on the web, then edit them with a GIMP2 or MSpaint.
Finally, you need a good program to create a video.
I Use Sony Vegas 10. It's a bit expensive, but it's worth it.
Also if you want good special effects I can recomande Particle Illusion.
author: @Themysteriouspirate
